nasb.text: When the disciples saw Him walking on the sea, they were terrified, and said, “It is a ghost!” And they cried out in fear.

esv.text: But when the disciples saw him walking on the sea, they were terrified, and said, “It is a ghost!” and they cried out in fear.

cnv.text: 門徒見他在海面上行走，就很驚慌，說：“有鬼啊！”並且恐懼得大叫起來。

ccb.text: 门徒看见有人在湖面上走，都吓坏了，说：“是幽灵！”他们害怕得又喊又叫。

csbs.text: 门徒们看见耶稣在湖面上行走，就惊慌不安，说：“是幽灵！”他们害怕得喊叫起来。
